design_philosophy: A frictionless, focus-driven mobile-first web app for Brazilian students. Reduces cognitive load via a 'deep ink' dark theme with warm amber/citrus accents for gamification. Combines Swiss UI clarity for reading/studying with Organic warmth to feel rewarding, not robotic.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto bg-[#090A0F] relative shadow-2xl
spacing_and_layout.desktop_wrapper: min-h-screen bg-black/95 flex items-center justify-center p-0 sm:p-4

animations.flashcard_flip: transition: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); transform-style: preserve-3d; rotateY(180deg)
animations.page_transition: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: -10 }

components.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md bg-[#12141D]/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-[#262A36] flex justify-around items-center h-20 pb-safe z-50
components.hero_card_5_min: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#12141D] to-[#1A1D27] border border-[#F5A623]/20 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(245,166,35,0.1)]
components.subject_card: flex items-center p-4 rounded-2xl bg-[#12141D] border border-[#262A36] hover:border-[#F5A623]/50 transition-colors
components.action_button: w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-[#090A0F] bg-[#F5A623] hover:bg-[#FFB800] transition-transform active:scale-95
components.srs_button: flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-transform active:scale-95 text-white bg-[#1A1D27] hover:bg-[#262A36]

onboarding_and_auth.layout: Minimalist screens with abstract 3D amber/dark geometric assets. Large typography.
onboarding_and_auth.auth_methods: JWT Custom (Email/Senha), Google, Apple. Stacked wide buttons.

elements: Greeting & Streak Indicator (Flame icon + count in amber)
Hero Card: 'Modo 5 minutos' with count of waiting questions, pulse animation on the CTA
Continue Studying Card: Links to the last accessed subject
Grid/List of subjects with progress bars
FAB (Floating Action Button) to add new subject
Content Sources list (Text, PDF, Photo, Link icons)
Sticky bottom bar with 'Start Quiz' or 'Flashcards' CTAs

add_content_modal.layout: Bottom sheet (BottomSheet) occupying 80% of screen height.
add_content_modal.flow: Select Type (4 grids) -> Type-specific input (Camera for photo, Textarea, URL input, File upload) -> Select Subject -> Generate

quiz_session.layout: Question card center, progress dots top.
quiz_session.interactions: Select option -> Confirm -> Instant haptic/visual feedback (Green pulse or Red shake) -> Explanation panel expands.

flashcard_session.interactions: Tap to flip (smooth 3D animation). Bottom reveals 4 SRS rating buttons: Errei (Red), Difícil (Amber), Bom (Blue), Fácil (Green).

perfil.heatmap: GitHub-style 365 days contribution graph using amber scale for intensity.
perfil.settings: List toggles including Dark Mode, Plan upgrade, Logout.

social_preview.layout: Teaser cards for 'Em breve': Grupos de Estudo, Duelos 1v1, Biblioteca, Ranking.

paywall_teaser.layout: Slide-up modal when free limit hit. Premium benefits listed with checkmarks. R$29/mês prominent CTA.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the mobile-first wrapper (max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen) with a deep dark background outside the app bounds to simulate a phone screen on desktop.
Implement the 4 bottom tabs with fixed positioning and safe-area padding.
Ensure all buttons and cards have active states (e.g., scale: 0.95 or translate-y-px) to mimic haptic touch.
Use Framer Motion for the Flashcard 3D flip and the quiz error shake.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements as required.
Build the 'Modo 5 minutos' hero card to feel premium and action-oriented.
For the Profile heatmap, use small grid squares with varying opacities of the amber accent color.
